name: Asmongold
text: The best part about being wrong on the internet is that 40,000 people will explain why within the hour. Free education.

name: Asmongold
text:
Every game studio: "we listened to the community"
The community: literally never asked for any of this

name: Asmongold
text: Stream in 2 hours. Big news day. Bring snacks.

name: Asmongold
text: Hot take: the $70 game isn't the problem. The $70 game that ships broken with a $30 battle pass is the problem.

name: Asmongold
text: McConnell said my chair is a biohazard. My chair has more hours streamed than his entire channel. Respect the chair.

name: Asmongold
text: Playing the new MMO tomorrow. If it's good I'll say it's good. If it's bad, well. You know the drill.

name: Asmongold
text: 12 years of streaming and the #1 question is still "what's that smell" — brother, it's ambition

name: Asmongold
text: OTK arena show announcement soon. This is the biggest thing we've ever done and I'm not exaggerating for once.
